Projects.title: Net-Clone
Projects.description: A dynamic web application inspired by Netflix, designed to manage and display video content with user authentication,interactive media controls and a stripe payment gateway. The project is showcasing my full-stack development skills using the MERN stack.

Projects.title: INVEX
Projects.description: An inventory management system named 'INVEX' with a custom UI design including a sidebar with a blueish linear gradient. The project features CRUD operations and dashboard analytics, developed using React and Tailwind CSS.

Projects.title: Sky View Wealth Application
Projects.description: Designed and implemented a financial planning tool that helps users manage their investments and financial goals. The application provides interactive tools for budgeting, investment tracking, and personalized financial advice.
